nodes.name: catalog_version.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for the catalog_version table tracking Notification and TableRevision versions.

nodes.name: cdc_table_snapshot_split.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for CDC table snapshot split tracking, recording backfill progress per split.

nodes.name: cluster.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for the cluster table, storing the RisingWave cluster identifier and creation time.

nodes.name: compaction_config.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for per-compaction-group compaction configuration stored in meta.

nodes.name: compaction_status.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for compaction task status tracking in meta storage.

nodes.name: compaction_task.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for active compaction tasks with serialized task payloads.

nodes.name: connection.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for named connection objects referencing external data sources.

nodes.name: database.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for database catalog objects with ownership and resource group.

nodes.name: exactly_once_iceberg_sink.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for exactly-once Iceberg sink metadata.

nodes.name: fragment.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for streaming fragments with distribution type, stream node, and vnode mapping.

nodes.name: fragment_relation.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model representing relations between streaming fragments for dispatcher/dispatcher mapping.

nodes.name: fragment_splits.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for fragment-level source split assignments.

nodes.name: function.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for user-defined function catalog entries including UDFs and UDAFs.

nodes.name: hummock_epoch_to_version.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model mapping Hummock epoch numbers to committed version IDs.

nodes.name: hummock_gc_history.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for Hummock GC history records of object IDs eligible for deletion.

nodes.name: hummock_pinned_snapshot.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for tracking pinned Hummock snapshots per worker node.

nodes.name: hummock_pinned_version.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for tracking pinned Hummock versions per worker node.

nodes.name: hummock_sequence.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for Hummock sequence counters used by SST, HummockVersion, etc.

nodes.name: hummock_sstable_info.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for SSTable metadata entries in Hummock meta storage.

nodes.name: hummock_table_change_log.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for per-table Hummock change log epoch data.

nodes.name: hummock_time_travel_delta.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for Hummock time-travel version delta records.

nodes.name: hummock_time_travel_version.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for Hummock time-travel full version snapshots.

nodes.name: hummock_version_delta.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for Hummock version deltas used in version checkpoint management.

nodes.name: hummock_version_stats.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for per-table Hummock version statistics.

nodes.name: iceberg_namespace_properties.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for Iceberg namespace property key-value pairs.
